articles.title: New ‘call a boomer’ phone line connects young people in Boston to seniors in Nevada
articles.description:
This new "social experiment" is the work of a biotech company that says it is aiming to bridge generational gaps and improve happiness.

The post New ‘call a boomer’ phone line connects young people in Boston to seniors in Nevada appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Biotech company launches 'call a boomer' line to connect Boston youth with Nevada seniors.
The initiative aims to bridge generational gaps and enhance happiness for participants.
Boston residents can engage in meaningful conversations, fostering community and reducing loneliness.

articles.title: The Latest: About 140 US troops injured, 8 severely, so far in Iran war, Pentagon says
articles.description:
The Pentagon offered its first tally of American wounded, saying about 140 U.S. troops have been injured, 8 severely.

The post The Latest: About 140 US troops injured, 8 severely, so far in Iran war, Pentagon says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Pentagon reports about 140 U.S. troops injured in Iran war, impacting military families in Boston.
Eight troops are severely injured, raising concerns for local veterans and support services.
Increased attention on Boston's military community as they prepare for potential local impacts.
